sprint.goal: KE-9: Browser governance + irreversible action detection design (#1384, #1385). Security maintenance complete (#1449 closed 2026-03-30T09:41Z).

senior.title: feat: irreversible action detection — human confirmation gates for one-way operations
senior.note: Sprint-labeled kernel feature. Design + prototype: add `irreversible` property to canonical action model, emit ConfirmationRequired event, kernel pause/resume integration. Extends existing blast radius infrastructure in kernel/src/blast-radius.ts. Open questions: boolean vs score, headless/cron timeout behavior, coord_signal integration.

secondary.title: feat: browser governance invariants — scope, state, and pacing for browser agents
secondary.note: Sprint-labeled feature. Design work: new invariant class for browser agents — tab/URL scope invariant, irreversible action gate, behavioral pacing invariant. Open questions: new action class (browser.navigate/click/submit) vs extending shell.exec? Coordinate with kernel architect on pacing + correction engine interaction.

closed.title: chore: triage Dependabot security alerts (path-to-regexp x2, brace-expansion)
closed.note: CLOSED prior cycle. Security deps triaged. 8 Dependabot PRs now open (#1484–#1491) — not security-critical, standard dep bumps for HQ EM to manage.
